name: Enric Asunción Escorsa
background: Mr. Asunción is one of our co-founders and has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since our inception in 2015. Previously, Mr. Asunción worked at Tesla, Inc. as a Charging Installations Program Manager from June 2014 to June 2015. Before that, he worked at Applus+ IDIADA as an Electric Vehicle Charging Engineer from July 2011 to June 2014.
